name: Key Lime Pie
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Key Lime Juice; or 1/3 cup Lemon juice and 1/3 cup Lime juice
1 Baked pie crust; or 1 Graham cracker crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until pale yellow.
2. Blend in milk and add lime juice, stirring until smooth.
3. Pour into pie shell and top with meringue or whipped cream.
4. Beat egg whites at high speed until foamy.
5. Add cream of tarter; beat until soft peaks form.
6. Reduce speed and gradually add sugar. Beat again until soft glossy peaks form.
7. Heap on pie, sealing the edges well.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven for approximately 15 minutes.
9. Cool at room temperature then chill.
You all enjoy!
